If you plan to use data binding in a Kotlin project, you should apply the kotlin-kapt plugin.
Very long vector path (4217 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
'clickable' attribute found, please also add 'focusable'
